name: ExtensionCoverage_SubscriberId
title: R5: subscriberId additional types
description: R5: `Coverage.subscriberId` additional types (Identifier) additional types from child elements (assigner, period, type)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Coverage.subscriberId` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Coverage.subscriberId` 0..* `Identifier`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Coverage.subscriberId` 0..* `Identifier`
*  R4B: `Coverage.subscriberId` 0..1 `string`
*  R4: `Coverage.subscriberId` 0..1 `string`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Coverage.subscriberId` allows multiple values in the source, but is mapped to an element that does not allow multiple values in the target.
Element `Coverage.subscriberId` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Coverage.subscriberId` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `Coverage.subscriberId` do not cover the following types: Identifier.
The mappings for `Coverage.subscriberId` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: assigner, period, type.
